title: ursinia frutescens
intro: Ursinia frutescens, also known as the Cape daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern region of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Ursinia frutescens include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and other gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Ursinia frutescens are commonly used in tea, capsule, or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
